title: phanera ornata subsp. ornata
intro: Phanera ornata subsp. ornata, also known as the decorated staff vine, is a species of climbing plant in the family Caesalpiniaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phanera ornata subsp. ornata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
